channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meta inks deal for space-based solar power at night
item.description: First contract with Overview Energy is a step toward space-based solar.

item.title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
item.description: Slow growth pushes Truecaller toward subscriptions and new features.

item.title: Stanford freshmen aim for world domination
item.description: Will this book send more students racing to the top?

item.title: What Tim Cook built at Apple
item.description: How Apple changed under Cook and challenges for incoming CEO John Ternus.
